description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a dark, likely black, grip tape covering the top surface. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the edges, and is mounted on two metal trucks with four small, hard wheels. The wheels are a light gray color and are positioned symmetrically beneath the deck, suitable for street or park use. The deck has pre-drilled holes for mounting the trucks, and the grip tape is plain with no visible graphics or cutouts. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible brand logos or decorative artwork.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape deck, wooden edges, metal trucks, and gray wheels. The design is plain and utilitarian, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and the front truck and wheels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the layered wooden edge, and both sets of gray wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the tail of the skateboard and the rear truck and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the deck profile, wooden edge, and both trucks and wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, metallic gray, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
